template_info.name: OpenChronicle Dynamic Narrative Template
template_info.description: Adaptable narrative progression template for dynamic storytelling systems
template_info.purpose: Provides faction networks, encounter systems, and narrative momentum mechanics for complex storytelling
template_info.optional_fields: Any field marked with '_optional': true can be safely deleted
template_info.usage: Delete entire fields/sections with '_optional': true, or just the '_optional' key to make field required

import_adaptability.arrays_expandable: All arrays can contain any number of entries - template shows minimum structure
import_adaptability.dynamic_factions: Faction networks can expand to accommodate any number of groups
import_adaptability.unlimited_modifications: All systems (encounters, tension, themes) can grow as needed
import_adaptability.flexible_structure: Import processes should expand arrays and adapt field counts dynamically

application_behavior.empty_optional_fields: Application will automatically ignore optional fields that are empty, null, or contain only placeholder values
application_behavior.unused_optional_fields: Optional fields left as {{PLACEHOLDER}} values will be treated as unused and ignored
application_behavior.processing_logic: Only populated optional fields with actual content will be processed by the application

engine_compatibility.character_interaction_engine: Faction relationships enhance character dialogue and conflicts
engine_compatibility.narrative_dice_engine: Dynamic encounters provide contextual random events
engine_compatibility.emotional_stability_engine: Thematic progression and emotional rhythms guide character development
engine_compatibility.scene_logger: Encounter systems and momentum tracking enrich scene context

usage_guidelines.implementation: Start with basic faction networks, add complexity gradually
usage_guidelines.customization: Adapt encounter triggers to your story's specific needs
usage_guidelines.balance: Use tension systems to maintain narrative pacing without overwhelming players
